about.title: Who We Are
about.tagline: Powering Banking, Financial Services & Capital Markets with AI, Data & Intelligent Innovation.
paragraphs: Stafróf Intelligence Corporation is a next-generation enterprise technology company dedicated to empowering the Banking, Financial Services, and Capital Markets (BFSM) industry through innovative AI, enterprise data, and intelligent automation platforms. We develop enterprise-grade products that help financial institutions modernize operations, optimize revenue, improve data intelligence, automate business processes, and accelerate digital transformation.

Our flagship platforms include: ● RevNexure – AI-powered Revenue Assurance Platform that helps identify, prevent, and recover revenue leakages across banking operations. ● DataXentra – Enterprise Data Platform that unifies, governs, and transforms enterprise data into trusted business intelligence. ● AgenNova – AI Intelligence Platform that enables intelligent automation, AI agents, and decision intelligence.
Our Purpose: To empower financial institutions with intelligent technologies that simplify complexity, accelerate innovation, and create lasting business value.
